basic_details.job_title: CMHO Bijapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 33 Staff Nurse, Support staff and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Chief Medical and Health Office Bijapur
basic_details.short_information: The latest Chief Medical and Health Office Bijapur (CMHO Bijapur) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Various Contractual Posts! Published under Advertisement No. 175/NHM/संविदा भर्ती/विज्ञापन/2026/बीजापुर on the official CMHO Bijapur website, this recruitment drive offers 33 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants aged between 18 and 70 years and possessing qualifications such as BDS, BPT, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, DMLT/BMLT, B.Sc Nursing, GNM, Post Graduate Degree/Diploma, Graduation with Computer Diploma, 12th Pass with Computer Diploma, DHLS, DTYDHH, B.Sc Home Science, or 8th Pass can apply

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 70 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS, BPT, BHMS/BAMS/BUMS, DMLT/BMLT, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic Nursing, BSC Nursing, GNM, 12th Pass with Diploma in Computer Application, Graduation with Diploma in Computer Application, PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/Counseling/Health Education/Mass Communication/Social Science, Post-Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/Anthropology/Human Development, DHLS, DTYDHH, BSc Home Science, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Dental Surgeon/Dentist: BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery) with Registration Dental Council of CG Registration. Physiotherapist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T.) with Registration in CG Council. Medical Officers - RBSK (Male): BHMS/BAMS/BUMS Degree Registration from any GOI Recognised (BAMS/BHMS/BUMS) Ayush, Homeo, Unani Registration Board of CG. Laboratory Technicians (BPHU & NHM): DMLT/BMLT/Pathology in Paramedical Course passed and mandatory registration in Chhattisgarh Paramedical Council. Community Health Officer (CHO): B.Sc. Nursing with Certificate in Community Health Integrated Course. Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Council. OR Post Basic Nursing with Certificate in Community Health Integrated Course. Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Council. Staff Nurse - NRC: BSC Nursing, or GNM Course Passed. Secretarial Assistant: 12th Passed with at least 1 year Diploma in Computer Application. Jr Secretarial Assistant (PADA): Graduation with at least 1 year Diploma in Computer Application. Counselor: PG Degree/Diploma in Psychology/ Counseling/ Health Education/ Mass Communication/ Social Science. Counselor - Blood Bank: Post-Graduate in Social Work/Sociology/Psychology/ Anthropology/ Human Development. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer. Experience: Minimum Two Years after essential qualification. 2nd ANM: 12th Pass, ANM Passed & INC affiliated Training Center & Live Registration in Chhattisgarh Nursing Registration Counselling. Technical Assistant - Audiometric: Diploma in Hearing Language and speech (DHLS) from RCI Recognized institute. Technical Assistant - hearing Impaired Children: Diploma in Training young deaf and hearing handicapped (DTYDHH) from RCI Recognized institute. Feeding Demonstrator: BSc Home Science. Attendant (NRC), Cook Cum Care Taker, Support staff (housekeeping staff): 8th Pass.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMHO Bijapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMHO Bijapur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMHO Bijapur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the CMHO Bijapur Various Contractual Posts is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for CMHO Bijapur recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies for various contractual posts released by the Chief Medical and Health Office Bijapur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the CMHO Bijapur posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 70 years for all the posts announced by CMHO Bijapur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for CMHO Bijapur recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for CMHO Bijapur contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual posts includes Document Verification and a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Chhattisgarh apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification specifies registration in Chhattisgarh councils for certain posts, implying a preference or requirement for Chhattisgarh residents. Please refer to the official notification for precise eligibility details.

faq.question: Q7. What is the highest salary offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The highest salary offered is Rs. 27,500/- per month for the post of Dental Surgeon/Dentist.

faq.question: Q8. What is the lowest salary offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The lowest salary offered is Rs. 8,800/- per month for the posts of Attendant (NRC) and Cook Cum Care Taker.

faq.question: Q9. Are these posts permanent or contractual?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Various Contractual Posts, as indicated in the official notification and job type.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article, under the "Official Notification PDF" link.
